notes: North Dakota baseline profile for scheduling context. Runtime mapping in this build applies ND minor-rule controls; break and overtime sections are stored for profile completeness and future rule-engine expansion.
source_notes: ND meal break baseline: 30-minute meal break for shifts exceeding 5 hours when 2 or more employees are on duty.
ND short rest breaks are not required; if provided, short breaks are paid.
Overtime baseline: >40 hours/week for covered nonexempt employees at 1.5x.
Youth employment scheduling limits (ages 14-15) include time-of-day and school/non-school day/week hour caps.
scheduling_notes: Current runtime hard-checks in this build enforce ND 14-15 minor windows and hour caps using model.nd_rules toggles.
Break and overtime sections are profile-complete data for policy reference and future runtime expansion.
